options.name: Get Backlinks Summary
options.description: Get an overview of backlink data for a domain, subdomain, or webpage

options.name: Get Historical Backlink Summary
options.description: Get historical backlink data for a domain back to the beginning of 2019

options.name: Get Backlinks
options.description: Get a list of backlinks for a domain, subdomain or page

options.name: Get Anchors
options.description: Get a detailed overview of anchors used when linking to the specified website with relevant backlink data for each of them

options.name: Get Domain Pages
options.description: Get a detailed overview of domain pages with backlink data for each page

options.name: Get Domain Pages Summary
options.description: Get a detailed summary data on all backlinks and related metrics for each page of the target domain or subdomain you specify

options.name: Get Referring Domains
options.description: Get a detailed overview of referring domains pointing to the target you specify

options.name: Get Referring Networks
options.description: Get a detailed overview of referring IPs and subnets pointing to the target you specify

options.name: Get Competitors
options.description: Get a list of competitors that share some part of the backlink profile with a target website, along with a number of backlink intersections and the rank of every competing website

options.name: Get Domain Intersection
options.description: Get the list of domains pointing to the specified websites

options.name: Get Page Intersection
options.description: Get the list of referring pages pointing to the specified targets

options.name: Get Backlinks Timeseries Summary
options.description: Get an overview of backlink data for the target domain available during a period between the two indicated dates

options.name: Get New & Lost Backlinks Timeseries Summary
options.action: Get new and lost backlinks timeseries summary
options.description: Get the number of new and lost backlinks and referring domains for the domain specified in the target field

options.name: Get Bulk Ranks
options.description: Get rank scores for up to 1,000 domains, subdomains, and pages

options.name: Get Bulk Backlinks
options.description: Get the number of backlinks for up to 1,000 domains, subdomains, and pages

options.name: Get Bulk Spam Scores
options.description: Get Spam Scores for up to 1,000 domains, subdomains, and pages

options.name: Get Bulk Referring Domains
options.description: Get the number of referring domains for up to 1,000 domains, subdomains, and pages

options.name: Get Bulk New & Lost Backlinks
options.action: Get bulk new and lost backlinks
options.description: Get the number of new and lost backlinks for up to 1,000 domains, subdomains, and pages

options.name: Get Bulk New & Lost Referring Domains
options.action: Get bulk new and lost referring domains
options.description: Get the number of new and lost referring domains for up to 1,000 domains, subdomains, and pages

options.name: Get Bulk Pages Summary
options.description: Get a comprehensive overview of backlinks and related data for a bulk of up to 1000 pages, domains, or subdomains

options.description: This operation doesn't accept empty filters.

options.name: Get Many
options.description: This will help you to fetch the list of documents in your account

options.name: Get
options.description: This retrieves the details of the document including the status of the document. Use the key “request_status” to check for document completion.

options.description: Retrieves the filled field data for a particular document

options.description: This will fetch the list of folders in your account

options.description: This will help you to retrieve field types

options.description: Retrieves the PDF content of a particular file

options.name: Download Completion Certificate
options.description: Retrieves the completion certificate PDF content

options.name: Recall
options.description: Recalling a request cancels the signing process. Once you recall a request, recipients can no longer view or sign it. You can recall a request if you send an incorrect document, or if you send it to an incorrect email address

options.name: Remind Recipient
options.description: A reminder is sent to the recipients who need to sign

options.name: Create a New Folder
options.description: This will help you to create a new folder

options.name: Create New Document Type
options.description: This will help you to create a new document type

options.name: Update Document Type
options.description: This will help you to update an existing document type

options.name: Correct
options.description: This will help you to mark a request, that has been submitted for signatures, as status = correction, so you can edit information of the sent request

options.name: Upload
options.description: This will create/upload a document

options.name: Submit
options.description: This will help you to send a request to your recipients for signing

options.name: Delete
options.description: Deleting a document moves it to trash

options.name: Extend
options.description: This will help you to extend the expiration date of the request signing link

options.name: Update
options.description: This will help you to update information regarding a request

options.name: Get Many
options.description: This will help you to fetch the list of templates in your account

options.name: Get
options.description: Get the details of a particular template using its ID

options.name: Upload
options.description: Upload a document or documents as a template

options.name: Send For Signatures
options.description: Use a template to send a request for signing to the recipients

options.name: Delete
options.description: Deleting a template moves it to trash
